Index: 
===================================================================

+++ 
@@ -3,17 +3,45 @@
 import * as sellerController from "../controllers/seller.controller.js";
 
 const router = express.Router();
 
-router.post( "/profile", protect, authorize("seller"), sellerController.createSellerProfile);
+// create seller profile
+router.post(
+  "/profile",
+  protect,
+  authorize("seller"),
+  sellerController.createSellerProfile
+);
 
-router.get("/profile",protect,authorize("seller"),sellerController.getMySellerProfile);
+// get my seller profile
+router.get(
+  "/profile",
+  protect,
+  authorize("seller"),
+  sellerController.getMySellerProfile
+);
 
-router.put("/profile",protect,authorize("seller"),sellerController.updateSellerProfile);
+// update profile
+router.put(
+  "/profile",
+  protect,
+  authorize("seller"),
+  sellerController.updateSellerProfile
+);
 
-router.put( "/bank-details", protect, authorize("seller"), sellerController.updateSellerBankDetails);
+// add or update bank details
+router.put(
+  "/bank",
+  protect,
+  authorize("seller"),
+  sellerController.updateSellerBankDetails
+);
 
-router.delete("/profile",protect,authorize("seller"),sellerController.deleteSellerProfile);
+// delete profile
+router.delete(
+  "/profile",
+  protect,
+  authorize("seller"),
+  sellerController.deleteSellerProfile
+);
 
-router.put("/bank", authMiddleware, sellerController.updateSellerBankDetails);
-
 export default router;
\ No newline at end of file
